summary.title: Professional Overview
summary.content: Fullstack Web Developer with a background in Informatics from Universitas Bina Sarana Informatika (GPA 4.00) and experience in building modern web applications using technologies such as React.js, Next.js, Flask, Spring Boot, and MongoDB.

focus.title: Technical Expertise
focus.content: Skilled in developing scalable backend services, designing responsive frontend interfaces, and integrating APIs to create efficient web solutions. Passionate about building reliable web systems and ensuring quality through rigorous testing.

highlights.title: Core Strengths
items: Fullstack: React.js, Next.js, Spring Boot, Flask
DevOps: Docker, Git, Modern CI/CD Tools
Quality Assurance: API Testing & Test Case Design
